name: Extinguishment of Prior Tax Obligations via Redistillation

eligibility.description: Available to proprietors of distilled spirits plants who redistill spirits, articles, or residues on bonded premises.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Any prior obligation as to taxes, liens, and bonds with respect to distilled spirits is extinguished upon redistillation on bonded premises.
